title: Understanding Clojure's Persistent Vectors, pt. 1
description: Ever wondered how Clojure's persistent vector actually works? This is part 1 of a blog series which aims to explain them.

summaryHistory.summary: There is space in the root, but not in the rightmost leaf node. 1: Just Like Assoc Whenever there is enough space in the rightmost leaf node, we can just do as we do when we perform an assoc: We just copy the path, and at the newly created leaf node, we put in the value to the right of the rightm...
